      The type of asset referenced by the security identifier

    • brokerCapacity

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder brokerCapacity(OrderCostPreviewResponseBrokerCapacity brokerCapacity)
      Capacity used in determining the order cost. Defaults to "AGENCY" if no value specified.

    • brokerCapacity

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder brokerCapacity(Optional<? extends OrderCostPreviewResponseBrokerCapacity> brokerCapacity)
      Capacity used in determining the order cost. Defaults to "AGENCY" if no value specified.

    • estimatedAccruedInterest

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder estimatedAccruedInterest(EstimatedAccruedInterest estimatedAccruedInterest)
      The estimated total of accrued interest that would be exchanged in an order of the given quantity

    • estimatedAccruedInterest

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder estimatedAccruedInterest(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EstimatedAccruedInterest> estimatedAccruedInterest)
      The estimated total of accrued interest that would be exchanged in an order of the given quantity

    • estimatedGrossAmount

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder estimatedGrossAmount(EstimatedGrossAmount estimatedGrossAmount)
      The principal amount involved, which is the notional value of the underlying assets that would be exchanged for the given quantity

    • estimatedGrossAmount

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder estimatedGrossAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EstimatedGrossAmount> estimatedGrossAmount)
      The principal amount involved, which is the notional value of the underlying assets that would be exchanged for the given quantity

    • estimatedGrossCreditAmount

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder estimatedGrossCreditAmount(EstimatedGrossCreditAmount estimatedGrossCreditAmount)
      Customer disclosure of the estimated gross credit (fee / markup) amount retained by broker based given the price adjustment schedule configured for orders executed in a principal capacity for a given quantity, and limit price. This amount is priced into the estimated_gross_credit_amount and is not separately charged explicitly.

    • estimatedGrossCreditAmount

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder estimatedGrossCreditAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EstimatedGrossCreditAmount> estimatedGrossCreditAmount)
      Customer disclosure of the estimated gross credit (fee / markup) amount retained by broker based given the price adjustment schedule configured for orders executed in a principal capacity for a given quantity, and limit price. This amount is priced into the estimated_gross_credit_amount and is not separately charged explicitly.

    • estimatedNetAmount

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder estimatedNetAmount(EstimatedNetAmount estimatedNetAmount)
      The estimated net notional amount involved in an order of the given quantity, capacity, and limit price. This will be the sum of the estimated gross amount and accrued interest, rounded to two decimal places. (For orders in the principal capacity, this total will include mark-up/mark-down price adjustments.)

    • estimatedNetAmount

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder estimatedNetAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends EstimatedNetAmount> estimatedNetAmount)
      The estimated net notional amount involved in an order of the given quantity, capacity, and limit price. This will be the sum of the estimated gross amount and accrued interest, rounded to two decimal places. (For orders in the principal capacity, this total will include mark-up/mark-down price adjustments.)

    • identifier

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder identifier(String identifier)
      Identifier of the asset (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).

    • identifier

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder identifier(Optional<String> identifier)
      Identifier of the asset (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).

    • identifierType

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder identifierType(OrderCostPreviewResponseIdentifierType identifierType)
      The identifier type of the asset used for price calculations. This will be the same value as what was sent on the request.

    • identifierType

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder identifierType(Optional<? extends OrderCostPreviewResponseIdentifierType> identifierType)
      The identifier type of the asset used for price calculations. This will be the same value as what was sent on the request.

    • limitPrice

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder limitPrice(OrderCostPreviewResponseLimitPrice limitPrice)
      The limit price to use in calculating costs. Only PERCENTAGE_OF_PAR will be accepted and returned.

    • limitPrice

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder limitPrice(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends OrderCostPreviewResponseLimitPrice> limitPrice)
      The limit price to use in calculating costs. Only PERCENTAGE_OF_PAR will be accepted and returned.

    • quantity

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder quantity(OrderCostPreviewResponseQuantity quantity)
      The quantity of the designated asset that would be ordered. For Fixed Income: Expressed in the par (face-value) amount and may not exceed two decimal places for USD-based currencies.

    • quantity

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder quantity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends OrderCostPreviewResponseQuantity> quantity)
      The quantity of the designated asset that would be ordered. For Fixed Income: Expressed in the par (face-value) amount and may not exceed two decimal places for USD-based currencies.

    • responseGenerationTime

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder responseGenerationTime(OffsetDateTime responseGenerationTime)
      The time the response was generated by the system

    • responseGenerationTime

      public OrderCostPreviewResponse.Builder responseGenerationTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> responseGenerationTime)
      The time the response was generated by the system
